ab: lawkah cimu kahabaag! rarasun cimu kisa’ ni papasibaq i tinqalangan na Itaal mitaal cu nanabakis na Itaal.
ch: A:大家好，老師今天要帶大家去部落訪問耆老。
en: A: Hello everyone, today I’m taking you to the tribe to interview the elders.

ab: uwal! makalay cami cu kayi’ na Matu’uwal kinku nanabakis na Itaal.
ch: B:好喔!我們要跟耆老說汶水泰雅語。

ab: sawbeh ta’ patayhuk la quw?
en: B: Are we almost there?

ab: uwal ga, sawbeh ta’ patayhik la.
en: A: Yeah! We’re almost there.

ab: utas, muwah cami mitaal isu’ la!
en: B: Grandpa, we’ve come to see you.

ab: waw! baaq cimu kumaal cu kayi’ na Matu’uwal! balayq cubalay!
ch: A:哇嗚！你們會說汶水泰雅啊!真是太棒了!
en: A:  Wow! You would say Matuuwal! That’s great!

ab: lawkah cimu kahabaag! rarasun cimu kisa’ ni papsibaq lumacu’ cu ki’man na turakis.
ch: A:大家好，老師今天要帶大家去拔除小米的雜草。
en: A:Hello everyone, today my teacher is going to take you to pull out the weeds of millet.

ab: uwal, papasibaq.
en: B: Yes, sir.

ab: uwah kahabaag tibalung i runi, laxi ungiiy maras ku paptawwa mamu.
ch: A:大家過來排隊，記得帶好工具。
en: A: Come and line up, remember to bring your tools.

ab: uwal, papasibaq, magal cami kahabaag cu papatawwaw la.
ch: B:是的，老師，我們都拿好工具了。
en: B: Yes, sir, we’ve got our tools.

ab: tayhuk ta’ la quw?
en: B: Are we there yet?

ab: ini’ na’, tatuhi’ na’.
en: A: Not yet, it’s still far away.

ab: Pihaw, usa’ i puqusiya’ isu’ cu pahpah quw?
en: A: You go watering.

ab: uwal, halay kuwing i puqusiya’.
en: B: Okay, I’ll water it.

ab: usa’ magal isu’ ku aalawa’!
en: A: You go get the bird catcher.

ab: uwal, halay ci papagiyay cu kabahneq.
en: B: Okay, I’ll go and catch the birds.

ab: lawkah cimu kahabaag! mausa’ ta’ i aangayan cu waqbux i kisa’.
ch: A:大家好，我們今天要去動物園。
en: A: Hello everyone, we are going to the zoo today.

ab: yani wala! paphicuwa’ ta’ i musa’?
ch: B:好棒喔!我們要怎麼去呢?
en: B: Awesome! How are we going to get there?

ab: gumalgay ta’ cu kulu’.
en: A: Let’s take the bus.

ab: nababalayq i tibalung, pabaynay ta’ cu gagluw la.
ch: A:大家排好隊，我們準備買票了。
en: A: Everyone line up, we are ready to buy tickets.

ab: uwal!
en: B: Yes.

ab: puwg ga kakbahneq, quruquru’ ku tagi sug, guwagiy nanak cimu.
ch: A:前面是鳥類，後面是蛇類，大家自己參觀。
en: A: There are birds in the front and snakes in the back.

ab: papsibaq, maicu ci cu quru’.
en: B: I’m afraid of snakes.

ab: hanuan ga, nanu’ usa’ umangay cu kakabahneq na isu’.
en: A: It doesn’t matter, then you go and watch the birds.

ab: qutux pincapngan cu wagi’ lga masautuay ta’ i runi lawwiy.
ch: A:我們一個小時後回來這裡集合。
en: A: We’ll meet back here in an hour.

ab: uwal, papsibaq, mahuway su’!
en: B: Yes, thank you, sir.

ab: nanuwan ku talan su’ sawni?
en: A: What did you see today?

ab: payux cubalay ku kintalan mu ka quru’ ru balayq talan ka kakbahneq.
ch: B:我看到了好多蛇，還有好多漂亮的鳥。
en: B: I saw a lot of snakes, and a lot of beautiful birds.

ab: nabuwiybuwiy tikay, mausa’ ta’ la.
en: A: Hurry up, we have to go.

ab: ini’ na’, ma’uway a kukuy mu.
en: B: Wait for me, my feet are tired.

ab: magalgay ta’ musa’ i lumanguy quw?
en: A: Shall we go swimming together?

ab: uwal! tila ga!
en: B:Yes! Let’s go!

ab: habaag cubalay a itaal kiya lumanguy i runi.
en: A: There are a lot of people swimming here.

ab: yayk a qusiya’ i tagi haca, asi ta’ languy i runi.
ch: B:那裡水很深，我們在這裡游泳就好。
en: B: The water is deep there, so we just swim here.
